data.content: Implementation review passed. cli_loom_prompt_resolution.rs contains 9 tests (330 lines) covering: regression matrix across all builtin profiles and action states, text/JSON claim output validation, default shipped workflow Loom prompt verification, skill command Loom body resolution, and acceptance criteria flow-through. Clear REGRESSION diagnostics on fallback or unresolved templates. All tests pass, make sanity green at 95.39% coverage.
